digest.title: 3-month fluoride varnish recall outperforms 6-month for high-risk adult caries
digest.summary: Multi-center Indian trial shows 38% lower caries recurrence with 3-month vs 6-month recall in adults with active decay history. No effect in low-risk patients.
digest.actionable: Reassess recall interval for adults flagged high-risk in your charting

output.body: Dr. Meera, compliance update: 3-month fluoride varnish recall outperforms 6-month for high-risk adult caries Multi-center Indian trial shows 38% lower caries recurrence with 3-month vs 6-month recall in adults with active decay history. No effect in low-risk patients. Suggested next step: Reassess recall interval for adults flagged high-risk in your charting Want me to pull the key points and draft a shareable post for you?
output.rationale: Digest/seasonal trigger; grounded summary + offer to externalize effort into a draft, inviting reply.
template_params: 3-month fluoride varnish recall outperforms 6-month for high-risk adult caries
Reassess recall interval for adults flagged high-risk in your charting

digest.title: DCI revised radiograph dose limits effective 2026-12-15
digest.summary: Maximum dose per IOPA exposure drops from 1.5 mSv to 1.0 mSv. E-speed film passes at the new limit; D-speed does not. Digital RVG sensors unaffected.
digest.actionable: Audit your X-ray setup before Dec 15; document E-speed or RVG in your SOPs

output.body: Dr. Meera, compliance update: DCI revised radiograph dose limits effective 2026-12-15. Deadline: 2026-12-15 Maximum dose per IOPA exposure drops from 1.5 mSv to 1.0 mSv. E-speed film passes at the new limit; D-speed does not. Digital RVG sensors unaffected. Suggested next step: Audit your X-ray setup before Dec 15; document E-speed or RVG in your SOPs I can draft a customer notice and a staff checklist. Reply YES/STOP.
output.rationale: High-urgency compliance/alert trigger; cites provided source/payload facts and offers a grounded stock-check/customer notice draft.
template_params: DCI revised radiograph dose limits effective 2026-12-15
Audit your X-ray setup before Dec 15; document E-speed or RVG in your SOPs

output.body: Hi Priya, Dr. Meera's Dental Clinic here. It's been since 2026-05-12 — your recall is due around 2026-11-12. 2 slots available: Wed 5 Nov, 6pm or Thu 6 Nov, 5pm. Dental Cleaning @ ₹299. Reply 1 for the first slot, 2 for the second, or share a time that works.
output.rationale: Customer recall trigger; uses provided last/due dates and slots, includes a concrete offer if available, and uses a low-friction slot CTA.
